raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "declarative statement of personal realization or belief adoption",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a Power greater than ourselves exists",
    "this Power has the capacity to restore sanity",
    "sanity was previously lost or impaired",
    "the speaker(s) underwent a process of coming to hold this belief"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a concise report of belief formation with no logical contradictions",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the statement accurately reflects the speaker's experience and is offered in a context where shared belief supports recovery or personal change",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is presented as empirical fact rather than subjective belief, or the referenced Power is claimed to produce effects it does not produce"
}
